description_long: This chaise features a minimalist, modern design with a sturdy rectangular metal frame supporting a series of evenly spaced, weathered wooden slats. The seat is elongated and flat, transitioning into a slightly angled backrest composed of four wide wooden planks, providing ergonomic support for lounging. The wood appears aged with a grayish patina, suggesting outdoor use and resistance to the elements. The legs are straight, square-profiled, and made of metal, giving the piece a robust and industrial look. There are no armrests, and the overall silhouette is sleek and functional, suitable for parks, patios, or urban relaxation zones. The surface texture of the wood is visibly rough, with natural grain and slight irregularities, while the metal frame has a matte finish.
description: A modern outdoor chaise with a weathered wooden slat seat and backrest on a sturdy metal frame, featuring a minimalist, industrial design and no armrests.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the chaise, the angled backrest, and the straight metal legs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the width of the seat, the four-segment backrest, and the absence of armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the same slatted seat and angled backrest.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the backrest and the two rear legs, with the slatted wood construction visible.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is composed of four wide, horizontally aligned wooden planks, slightly angled for ergonomic support. It is flat, segmented, and lacks any decorative elements or curvature.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, square-profiled, and constructed from metal with a matte finish, providing a simple and sturdy base without decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: There is no upholstery; the surface consists of exposed wooden slats with a visible natural grain and weathered texture.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: No cushions are present; the seating and backrest surfaces are formed entirely by fixed wooden slats.
